notes: v2.5.8 - Streaming stability: a focused update to the CATIA remote-viewing pilot. Everything outside remote viewing is unchanged from v2.5.7. The video now takes a relay path to the shared CATIA workstation, clearing up the mid-session freezes and dropped connections that could leave you stuck on a frozen frame. If the connection does drop, the session re-establishes automatically and brings the view back rather than leaving you to reconnect by hand. Mouse and keyboard sent to the remote CATIA window now travel on a reliable channel, so clicks and keystrokes are far less likely to be dropped or land late. This remains a limited pilot for a small group of authorised engineers, running one session at a time on a single shared workstation.
